violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -No date on mashed potatoes. No date on thawed, pre-cooked chicken. -Items made to day mis-dated as make date of 1/29.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Sauce with make date of 1/15.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cardboard being used as shelf divider in 2 door glass cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Gaskets are cracked through/damaged at 2 door stainless refrigerator. -Caulking is gapped/missing at back of hand sink. -Caulking is damaged/discolored around mop sink basin.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Mild residue at underside of oven handles and some debris at interior bottoms. -Dust/debris at upper interior fans of 2 door stainless refrigerator. -Some dust/residue at back side of make line equipment. -Limescale build up at back side of ice machine.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Ware wash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Heavy limescale/grease residue at interior surfaces of kitchen dishwasher.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Gravy stated as reheated and then placed into warmer. Found with a center temp of 113F and edge temp of 153F. *Ensure hot hold items are stirred frequently.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
